title: Adax Neo Electric Panel Heater/Convector Radiator With Timer, Thermostat, Modern, Slimline, Wall Mounted, White, 1000W
features: ENERGY-SAVING FEATURES – Weekly program, day/night setback, and open-window detection reduce wasted energy and lower heating costs automatically.
SAFE EVERYDAY USE – IP20 protection, Class I grounding, and overheat protection ensure reliable and worry-free electric heating.
SLIM SCANDINAVIAN DESIGN – Space-saving 90 mm panel heater fits any interior. Available in White or Lava Grey.
Ideal for heating room spaces such as home, office, bedroom, lounge, dining room, conservatory, caravan, hotel, shed, outbuilding, extensions.
FLEXIBLE SIZES & POWER – Two heights (200 or 370 mm) and wattages from 400W–2000W to suit small or large rooms. Easy wall mounting with 1.3 m cable length.
LONG-TERM RELIABILITY – Ecodesign 2018 approved for efficiency and sustainability, backed by a 5-year warranty.
description: Product Description Why it’s great. This heater is a bestseller with over 100,000 units sold in the UK alone. Known for its reliability and minimalist Norwegian design Original Quality. Modern Design. The heater's attractive minimalist styling allow the panel to discreetly complement the surroundings. Making the Neo the ideal heater for your Livingroom, kitchen or conservatory. Featuring curved edges and finished with decorative side panels, the heater possesses all the qualities that you would expect from a Norwegian heater. The Neo is available in 6 different colours. With a wall projection of only 84mm to the front face, the Neo is one of the most slimline electric heaters available today. Superior Style. Functional Controls. The front of the panel houses a clearer LCD Thermostat Display . To keep a clean aesthetic, the controls are tidily located on the side. The simple controls allow the heater's thermostat to be easily adjusted with a push of a button. Simply use the + or - button to adjust the set temperature. 24 hour, 7 day timer . Programme each hour of the day to a "comfort" or "anti-frost" (off) mode. Saving energy and reducing running costs. Comfort and Science. ADAX’s efficient heating elements are made from a aluminium alloy and feature a fin design. Providing a fast warm up and a longer cool down time . Outstanding conductivity, low weight and good heat distribution. The result is rapid, eco convection heating. Specially treated preventing the dry air feel, associated with electric convectors. This makes the heaters perfect for both children’s rooms as well as allergy suffers. The Neo panel heater has 2 additional energy saving modes: Open Window Detection - Recognise when a door / window has been opened and temporarily shuts off the heater Adaptive Start - Learns how long is required to heat the space. Then uses this to calculate the best time to start heating. Norwegian Design Since 1948 In Adax's homeland, in Norway, and across Europe the Neo is one of the most popular electric panel heaters. So that you can have full confidence in ADAX’s cover. So much so, ADAX is a firm favourite of Building Developers and contractors, with 1000’s being installed in recent property developments. The Heater arrives with a 3 pin plug fitted, ready for an easy installation. Power lead is approximately 1.2m long. Modern and stylish electric heater Slimline. Only 85mm when wall mounted ! Digital, easy to use, thermostat Full 7 day 24 hour timer Comfort and Anti frost / reduced heat modes Open Window detection Adaptive Timer start (Learns the optimum time to begin heating) Overheat safety cut out. Easy to install wall bracket system included. Energy Efficient, exceeds 2018 Lot20 heating regulations. Made in Europe Full NEMCO certification. 370mm standard height and 200mm skirting height versions available. Easy to install with 3 pin UK plug.

specifications_table.Special Features: Adjustable Temperature, Electronic Thermostat, Energy Efficient, Overheat Protection, Child Lock, Built-in Timer, Programmable Thermostat
